_doc: Concept→symbol eval for code_lookup (docs/code-symbol-index.md §6). Each case: a query, the expected symbol (substring match on fqname; a list = any-of), the project, and kind (concept | name). `name` cases probe the sparse/BM25 side (bare/partial identifiers); `concept` cases probe the dense description side. The kind split lets scripts/eval_code.py show whether a given RRF sparse_weight trades concept accuracy for name accuracy. Requires the projects to be code-indexed first (crib code-index …).

cases.q: combine several ranked result lists into one ranking
the per-project cache holding BM25 indexes
score documents against a query with a cross-encoder
split a compound identifier so a spaced query matches
render a language-idiomatic qualified symbol name
gate whether an LLM description needs regenerating by body hash
refresh an expired oauth access token
manage a shared background server process with refcounting
validate or normalize a tool's json schema
filter which tools are visible for a chat session
